description_long: This object is a classic double-barrel shotgun featuring a long, blued steel barrel assembly and a polished wooden stock. The barrels are arranged side-by-side, with a visible rib running along the top for sight alignment. The stock is full-sized, crafted from a medium-brown wood with a smooth finish and a slightly curved butt for shoulder support. The trigger guard is rounded and metallic, enclosing a single visible trigger. The fore-end is also wooden, matching the stock, and the break-action hinge is subtly visible at the junction between the barrels and the receiver. The overall design is traditional, with no visible modern attachments or embellishments.
description: A traditional side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a polished wooden stock and long blued steel barrels. It features a rounded trigger guard and a classic break-action design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, side-by-side barrels, and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front-on view down the barrels, clearly displaying the twin barrel openings and the rib between them.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with the wooden stock and double barrels visible.
description_view_3: Rear view from the buttstock, showing the end of the stock and the alignment of the barrels.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel with a visible top rib and equal barrel lengths
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized metallic guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
